igbo.strong_acid_strong_base: Acid siri ike + Base siri ike
igbo.weak_acid_strong_base: Acid na-adịghị ike + Base siri ike
igbo.strong_acid_weak_base: Acid siri ike + Base na-adịghị ike
igbo.splash_proof_chemical_safety_goggles_n: Ugogbe anya nchekwa kemịkal na-egbochi mmiri fesa, ọ bụghị ugogbe anya nkịtị
igbo.protects_skin_from_corrosive_acids_and: Na-echebe akpụkpọ ahụ pụọ na acid na base na-emebi emebi
igbo.button_it_up_protects_clothing_and_ski: Kpọchie bọtịnụ: na-echebe uwe na akpụkpọ ahụ pụọ na mmiri fesa
igbo.no_sandals_or_open_toed_shoes_in_the_c: Enweghị akpụkpọ ụkwụ mepere emepe na ụlọ nyocha kemịkal
igbo.know_where_it_is_before_you_start_you_: Mara ebe ọ dị tupu ị malite: ị nwere sekọnd 10 ọ bụrụ na o fesara gị
igbo.acetic_acid_is_flammable_know_your_nea: Acid acetic na-enwu ọkụ: mara igwe mgbanyụ ọkụ gị kacha nso
igbo.sds_reviewed_for_chemicals: Enyochala mpempe akwụkwọ data nchekwa (SDS) maka kemịkal
igbo.safety_data_sheets_list_all_hazards_pp: Mpempe akwụkwọ data nchekwa na-edepụta ihe egwu niile, akụrụngwa nchekwa, na usoro mberede
igbo.always_add_titrant_slowly_near_the_exp: Mgbe niile tinye titrant nwayọọ nso na isi nhata a na-atụ anya ya. Otu ntụpọ nwere ike ịgbanwe pH nke ukwuu!
igbo.the_ph_is_changing_rapidly_in_a_real_l: pH na-agbanwe ngwa ngwa! N'ụlọ nyocha n'ezie, gbanwee ka ị na-atụ ntụpọ na ntụpọ ma fee ya mgbe ọ bụla ntụpọ gasịrị.
igbo.you_overshot_the_equivalence_point_in_: Ị gafere isi nhata! N'ụlọ nyocha n'ezie, ị ga-amalitegharị site na ihe atụ ọhụrụ.
igbo.good_lab_practice_always_rinse_the_bur: Ezigbo omume ụlọ nyocha: buru ụzọ saa biuret na mmiri dị ọcha, mgbe ahụ na ngwọta titrant tupu ịgba ọzọ.
igbo.at_the_half_equivalence_point_ph_pka_t: Na isi nhata ọkara pH = pKa. Nke a bụ etiti mpaghara buffer!
igbo.kmno_is_a_strong_oxidizer_in_a_real_la: KMnO₄ bụ oxidizer siri ike! N'ụlọ nyocha n'ezie, debe ya n'ebe dị anya na ihe mgbaze organic ma jiri fume hood. Odo odo → enweghị agba = isi nhata.
igbo.polyprotic_acids_have_multiple_equival: Acid polyprotic nwere ọtụtụ isi nhata! Rịba ama ka ihü nkịtị S si dị larịị n'etiti isi nhata ọ bụla (mpaghara buffer).
igbo.in_a_back_titration_you_add_excess_aci: Na titration azụ, ị na-ebu ụzọ tinye acid karịrị akarị, mgbe ahụ na-eme titration acid fọdụrụ. Ọ na-arụ ọrụ maka analytes na-adịghị agbaze dị ka CaCO₃.
igbo.never_add_water_to_concentrated_acid_a: Etinyela mmiri na acid siri ike ma ọlị! Mgbe niile tinye acid na mmiri. «Mee ya nke ọma: acid na mmiri.» Mmegharị na-esi ọkụ nwere ike ịkpata mmiri fesa dị ize ndụ.
igbo.when_using_volatile_reagents_like_nh_o: Mgbe ị na-eji reagents na-efe efe dị ka NH₃ ma ọ bụ HCl (siri ike), mgbe niile rụọ ọrụ n'okpuru fume hood. Iku ume acid/base na-ebibi anụ ahụ ngụgụ.
igbo.read_the_burette_at_the_bottom_of_the_: Gụọ biuret n'okpuru meniscus, na anya gị n'ọkwa elu mmiri. Njehie parallax na-emetụta izi ezi!
igbo.while_pouring_hcl_some_splashes_on_you: Mgbe ị na-awụsa HCl, ụfọdụ na-efesa n'aka gị.
igbo.remove_clothing_rinse_under_running_wa: Wepụ uwe, saa n'okpuru mmiri na-asọ asọ nkeji 15+
igbo.correct_immediate_and_prolonged_rinsin: Ziri ezi! Ịsa ozugbo na ogologo oge dị ezigbo mkpa. Nkeji 15 na-egbochi mmebi anụ ahụ.
igbo.wipe_it_off_with_a_paper_towel: Jiri akwa nhicha akwụkwọ hichaa ya
igbo.wrong_wiping_can_spread_the_acid_and_p: Ezighị ezi! Ihicha nwere ike ịgbasa acid ma nyanye ya n'akpụkpọ ahụ gị. Ị chọrọ mmiri na-asọ asọ ozugbo.
igbo.apply_baking_soda_paste_directly_to_sk: Tinye paste baking soda ozugbo n'akpụkpọ ahụ
igbo.not_recommended_the_neutralization_rea: A naghị akwado ya! Mmegharị mkpochapụ na-emepụta okpomọkụ (na-esi ọkụ) nke nwere ike ịba ọrịa ọkụ ụba. Mmiri mgbe niile bụ mmeghachi omume mbụ.
igbo.it_s_dilute_just_keep_working: Ọ dị larịị, naanị nọgide na-arụ ọrụ
igbo.dangerous_even_dilute_acids_can_cause_: Ize ndụ! Ọbụna acid dị larịị nwere ike ịkpata ọkụ ka oge na-aga. Mgbe niile jikwaa kọntaktị kemịkal ozugbo.
igbo.naoh_solution_splashes_into_your_eyes_: Mgbe ị na-efegharị, ngwọta NaOH na-efesa n'anya gị.
igbo.go_to_eyewash_station_immediately_rins: Gaa ebe ịsa anya ozugbo, saa nkeji 15+, meghee mkpịsị anya
igbo.correct_speed_is_everything_you_have_a: Ziri ezi! Ọsọ bụ ihe niile: ị nwere ihe dị ka sekọnd 10 tupu mmebi siri ike amalite. Meghee mkpịsị anya ma hulata isi gị iji gbochie mmetọ ịgbasa n'anya nke ọzọ.
igbo.rub_your_eyes_and_blink_rapidly: Tụọ anya gị ma kụọ anya ngwa ngwa
igbo.never_rub_this_spreads_the_chemical_ac: Etụla ma ọlị! Nke a na-agbasa kemịkal n'elu anya buru ibu ma nwee ike ịkọ cornea.
igbo.use_eye_drops_from_the_first_aid_kit: Jiri mmiri anya sitere na kit enyemaka mbụ
igbo.eye_drops_are_insufficient_you_need_hi: Mmiri anya ezughị! Ị chọrọ ịsa nke buru ibu maka nkeji 15+. Mmiri anya enweghị ike inye nke ahụ.
igbo.finish_the_experiment_first_then_wash: Buru ụzọ mechaa nnwale, mgbe ahụ saa
igbo.extremely_dangerous_naoh_causes_alkali: Ize ndụ nke ukwuu! NaOH na-akpata ọkụ alkali nke na-abanye omimi ka oge na-aga. Sekọnd ọ bụla dị mkpa. Mmerụ anya kemịkal bụ ihe kpatara #1 nke ìsì n'ụlọ nyocha.
igbo.you_knock_over_the_beaker_of_0_1m_hcl_: Ị kwatuo beaker nke 0.1M HCl, na-awụsa ihe dị ka 200 ml n'elu bench.
igbo.alert_others_contain_with_absorbent_ne: Dọọ ndị ọzọ aka na ntị, jide na absorbent, mee ka ọ dị nhaghị site na NaHCO₃, hichaa na mmiri
igbo.perfect_procedure_1_alert_nearby_stude: Usoro zuru oke! (1) Dọọ ụmụ akwụkwọ nọ nso aka na ntị (2) Jide mgbasa na pad absorbent (3) Fesa sodium bicarbonate iji mee ka ọ dị nhaghị (4) Hichaa na mmiri (5) Tufuo ya nke ọma.
igbo.just_flood_it_with_lots_of_water: Naanị jiri mmiri buru ibu wụsa ya
igbo.partially_right_but_incomplete_floodin: Ziri ezi n'akụkụ mana ezughị oke. Iwụsa na-agbasa acid karịa ma anaghị eme ka ọ dị nhaghị. Buru ụzọ jide, mgbe ahụ mee ka ọ dị nhaghị, mgbe ahụ saa.
igbo.tell_the_teacher_and_don_t_touch_it: Gwa onye nkụzi ma emetụla ya aka
igbo.telling_the_teacher_is_good_but_at_0_1: Ịgwa onye nkụzi dị mma mana na 0.1M enwere ike ijikwa nke a. Ị kwesịrị ịmalite ijide ozugbo mgbe mmadụ na-adọ onye nkụzi aka na ntị. Ekwela ka ọ ruo n'ọnụ ọnụ bench.
igbo.soak_it_up_with_paper_towels: Jiri akwa nhicha akwụkwọ mikpuo ya
igbo.paper_towels_are_not_appropriate_for_a: Akwa nhicha akwụkwọ adịghị mma maka ọwụwa acid! Ọ naghị eme ka acid dị nhaghị ma ị ga-ejikwa ihe mmiri acid dere. Jiri kit ọwụwa kwesịrị ekwesị.
igbo.while_working_with_ammonia_nh_you_noti: Mgbe ị na-arụ ọrụ na ammonia (NH₃), ị na-ahụ isi ísì siri ike ma anya gị na-amalite ịkpọ anya mmiri.
igbo.move_the_experiment_to_the_fume_hood_i: Bugharịa nnwale gaa na fume hood ozugbo, mee ka ikuku bata na mpaghara ahụ
igbo.correct_volatile_chemicals_like_nh_mus: Ziri ezi! Kemịkal na-efe efe dị ka NH₃ ga-eji fume hood jikwaa. Ọ bụrụ na ị nwere ike ịnụ isi ya, ị na-eku ya. Meghee windo ma pụọ n'ikuku dị ọcha ma ọ bụrụ na hood dị anya.
igbo.put_on_a_face_mask_and_continue: Tinye ihe mkpuchi ihu ma gaa n'ihu
igbo.a_regular_face_mask_does_not_protect_a: Ihe mkpuchi ihu nkịtị anaghị echebe pụọ na ume kemịkal! Ị chọrọ nchekwa iku ume kwesịrị ekwesị (adịghị n'ọtụtụ ụlọ nyocha akwụkwọ) ma ọ bụ fume hood.
igbo.fan_the_fumes_away_with_your_hand: Jiri aka gị fee anwụrụ ka ọ pụọ
igbo.fanning_is_for_wafting_to_detect_odors: Ifegharị bụ maka iweta ikuku nwayọọ iji chọpụta isi (iweta ikuku nwayọọ na imi gị). Ọ naghị ewepụ anwụrụ dị ize ndụ na mpaghara ahụ. Ị chọrọ ikuku ịbata!
igbo.it_s_just_a_little_smell_keep_going: Ọ bụ naanị obere isi, gaa n'ihu
igbo.dangerous_if_you_can_smell_nh_the_conc: Ize ndụ! Ọ bụrụ na ị nwere ike ịnụ isi NH₃, ọnụ ọgụgụ nwere ike ịgafe oke dị mma (25 ppm). Kọntaktị ogologo oge na-akpata ọkụ kemịkal n'ụzọ iku ume. NH₃ nke >300 ppm nwere ike ịbụ ihe na-egbu egbu.
igbo.a_classmate_suggests_cleaning_the_benc: Mgbe ị ka mepere ngwọta ammonia, onye klas gị na-atụ aro ka e jiri bleach hichaa bench.
igbo.stop_them_immediately_bleach_ammonia_t: Kwụsị ha ozugbo! Bleach + ammonia = gas chloramine nsi
igbo.life_saving_action_naocl_2nh_2nh_cl_ch: Omume nzọpụta ndụ! NaOCl + 2NH₃ → 2NH₂Cl (chloramine) — gas nsi na-akpata mmebi iku ume siri ike. Nke a bụ otu n'ime ngwakọta mberede kacha dị ize ndụ n'ụlọ nyocha. Mgbe niile mee ka kemịkal niile dị nhaghị ma tufuo ha tupu iji ngwọta nhicha ọ bụla.
igbo.sure_bleach_is_a_disinfectant_it_shoul: N'ezie, bleach bụ ihe na-egbu nje, ọ kwesịrị ịdị mma
igbo.extremely_dangerous_mixing_bleach_naoc: Ize ndụ nke ukwuu! Ịgwakọta bleach (NaOCl) na ammonia na-emepụta gas chloramine nsi. Ọ kpatala ọnwụ n'ụlọ nyocha na ụlọ. Egwakọtala bleach na kemịkal ọ bụla ọzọ ma ọlị.
igbo.it_should_be_fine_if_the_ammonia_is_di: Ọ kwesịrị ịdị mma ma ọ bụrụ na ammonia dị larịị
igbo.wrong_even_dilute_ammonia_reacts_with_: Ezighị ezi! Ọbụna ammonia dị larịị na-emeghachi omume na bleach iji mepụta gas chloramine nsi. Mmeghachi omume na-eme na ọnụ ọgụgụ ọ bụla. Enweghị mmebi larịị dị mma iji gwakọta kemịkal ndị a.
igbo.just_open_a_window_and_it_will_be_fine: Naanị meghee windo ọ ga-adị mma
igbo.ventilation_does_not_make_it_safe_to_g: Ikuku ịbata anaghị eme ka ọ dị mma imepụta gas nsi! Chloramine na-akpata nsogbu iku ume ozugbo. Mgbochi bụ naanị ụzọ a nabatara.
igbo.holds_the_analyte_solution_being_titra: Na-ejide ngwọta analyte a na-eme titration.
igbo.changes_color_to_signal_the_endpoint: Na-agbanwe agba iji gosi isi nhata.
igbo.contains_distilled_water_for_rinsing: Nwere mmiri dị ọcha maka ịsa.
igbo.goggles_gloves_and_lab_coat: Ugogbe anya, uwe aka, na uwe elu ụlọ nyocha
igbo.all_three_are_mandatory_goggles_protec: Ha atọ dị mkpa: ugogbe anya na-echebe anya pụọ na mmiri fesa, uwe aka na-echebe aka pụọ na ihe na-emebi emebi, uwe elu na-echebe uwe na akpụkpọ ahụ.
igbo.rinse_with_running_water_for_15_min: Saa na mmiri na-asọ asọ nkeji 15+
igbo.water_first_always_the_15_minute_rinse: Mmiri mbụ mgbe niile! Ịsa nkeji 15 dị mkpa. Ihe na-eme ka ọ dị nhaghị nwere ike ịkpata mmeghachi na-esi ọkụ n'akpụkpọ ahụ.
igbo.where_moles_of_acid_moles_of_base: Ebe moles nke acid = moles nke base
igbo.the_equivalence_point_is_the_stoichiom: Isi nhata bụ isi stoichiometric. pH na isi nhata dabere na ike acid/base — ọ bụ naanị pH 7 maka acid siri ike + base siri ike.
igbo.the_exothermic_reaction_can_cause_viol: Mmeghachi na-esi ọkụ nwere ike ịkpata ọgbaghara siri ike na mmiri fesa
igbo.when_water_hits_concentrated_acid_the_: Mgbe mmiri kụrụ acid siri ike, okpomọkụ a wepụtara nwere ike ịgbọ mmiri ozugbo, na-akpata mmiri fesa siri ike nke acid dị ọkụ. Ịtinye acid na mmiri na-ekesa okpomọkụ n'ofe oke mmiri buru ibu.
igbo.at_equivalence_only_the_conjugate_base: Na isi nhata, naanị base conjugate (A⁻) fọdụrụ. Base conjugate nke acid na-adịghị ike n'onwe ya bụ base na-adịghị ike, nke na-eme ka ngwọta bụrụ base (pH > 7).
igbo.strong_acid_strong_base_or_weak_acid_s: Acid siri ike + base siri ike ma ọ bụ acid na-adịghị ike + base siri ike
igbo.phenolphthalein_transitions_at_ph_8_2_: Phenolphthalein na-agbanwe na pH 8.2-10.0 nke dabara na pH isi nhata base nke titration acid na-adịghị ike + base siri ike. Ọ na-arụkwa ọrụ maka acid siri ike+base siri ike n'ihi na mfe na-agafe oke ya.
igbo.bleach_ammonia_chloramine_gas_toxic_bl: Bleach + ammonia = gas chloramine (nsi). Bleach + acid = gas chlorine (nsi). Ha abụọ nwere ike ịkpata mmerụ iku ume siri ike ma ọ bụ ọnwụ. Egwakọtala bleach na kemịkal ma ọlị.
igbo.23_45_has_4_significant_figures_the_la: 23.45 nwere ọnụọgụ 4 dị mkpa. Ọnụọgụ ikpeazụ (5) ka a tụrụ n'etiti akara. Biuret dị ziri ezi ruo ±0.05 ml.
igbo.at_half_equivalence_ha_a_so_henderson_: Na isi nhata ọkara [HA] = [A⁻] ya mere Henderson–Hasselbalch na-enye pH = pKa + log(1) = pKa. Nke a bụ etiti mpaghara buffer.
igbo.when_handling_1m_concentrated_acids_or: Mgbe ị na-ejikwa acid ma ọ bụ base siri ike >1M
igbo.face_shields_provide_splash_protection: Ihe nchekwa ihu na-enye nchekwa mmiri fesa maka ihu niile. Achọrọ ya maka ihe na-emebi emebi siri ike (>1M), ikpo ọkụ, na usoro ọ bụla nwere ihe ize ndụ mmiri fesa gafere mpaghara anya.
igbo.naoh_causes_alkali_burns_that_penetrat: NaOH na-akpata ọkụ alkali nke na-abanye n'anya n'ime sekọnd 10. Enweghị ugogbe anya, otu mmiri fesa nwere ike ịkpata ọnwụ anya na-adịgide.
igbo.concentrated_hcl_dissolves_skin_on_con: HCl siri ike na-agbaze akpụkpọ ahụ ozugbo ọ metụrụ. Ọbụna acid dị larịị na-akpata mgbakasị. Aka gị dị nso na kemịkal karịa.
igbo.a_splash_of_acid_or_base_will_burn_thr: Mmiri fesa nke acid ma ọ bụ base ga-agba ọkụ site na uwe na akpụkpọ ahụ. Uwe elu na-enye oyi akwa mgbochi enwere ike iwepụ.
igbo.a_dropped_beaker_sends_glass_and_chemi: Beaker dara na-eziga iko na kemịkal n'ofe ala. Akpụkpọ ụkwụ mepere emepe pụtara acid n'ụkwụ gba ọtọ.
igbo.equip_each_piece_of_ppe_before_proceed: Yiri akụrụngwa nchebe ọ bụla tupu ịga n'ihu. N'ụlọ nyocha n'ezie, ị nweghị ike imetụ kemịkal aka na-enweghị nchekwa zuru oke.
igbo.continue_to_lab_scan_station: Gaa n'ihu na ebe nyocha ụlọ nyocha
igbo.continue_to_lab_scan: 🔬 Gaa n'ihu na nyocha ụlọ nyocha →
igbo.find_each_piece_of_safety_equipment_on: Chọta akụrụngwa nchekwa ọ bụla na maapụ ụlọ nyocha. Na mberede n'ezie, sekọnd dị mkpa — ị ga-amara ebe ihe niile dị tupu ị malite.
igbo.the_10_second_rule_if_chemicals_splash: Iwu sekọnd 10: ọ bụrụ na kemịkal fesara n'anya gị, ị nwere ihe dị ka sekọnd 10 iru ebe ịsa anya tupu mmebi na-adịgide amalite. Meghee mkpịsị anya ma saa nkeji 15+.
igbo.remember_p_a_s_s_pull_the_pin_aim_at_b: Cheta P.A.S.S.: Pull (Dọpụ pin), Aim (Lekwasị anya na ala ọkụ), Squeeze (Pịa aka), Sweep (Kpochapụ site n'otu akụkụ ruo nke ọzọ). Acid acetic na ụfọdụ ihe mgbaze na-enwu ọkụ — mara ebe a tupu ị malite.
igbo.sds_documents_list_all_hazards_require: Akwụkwọ SDS na-edepụta ihe egwu niile, akụrụngwa nchekwa achọrọ, usoro enyemaka mbụ, na kọntaktị mberede maka kemịkal ọ bụla n'ụlọ nyocha. Nyochaa ha tupu ijikwa kemịkal ọ bụla.
igbo.lab_safety_map_complete: 🗺️ Maapụ nchekwa ụlọ nyocha zuru oke!
igbo.you_can_now_locate_all_emergency_equip: Ugbu a ị nwere ike ịchọta akụrụngwa mberede niile site na bench gị. Na mberede, sekọnd ọ bụla dị mkpa — ihe ọmụma a nwere ike ịzọpụta ndụ.
igbo.review_every_chemical_you_will_handle_: Nyochaa kemịkal ọ bụla ị ga-ejikwa taa. Pịa kaadị ọ bụla iji kwenye na ị ghọtara ihe egwu.
igbo.tap_to_acknowledge_you_ve_reviewed_thi: ☝ Pịa iji kwenye na ị nyochara kemịkal a
igbo.lab_safety_confirmed_enter_virtual_lab: 🧪 Ekwenyela nchekwa ụlọ nyocha — Banye ụlọ nyocha mebere
igbo.titration_lab_keyboard_shortcuts_1_thr: Ụlọ nyocha titration. Ụzọ mkpirisi keyboard: 1 ruo 5 gbanwee taabụ.
igbo.ppe_active_lab_safety_verified: Akụrụngwa nchebe na-arụ ọrụ • Enyochala nchekwa ụlọ nyocha
igbo.eyewash_10_second_rule_fire_extinguish: 🚿 Ịsa anya: iwu sekọnd 10 • 🧯 Achọtala mgbanyụ ọkụ • 📋 Enyochala SDS
igbo.add_titrant_drop_by_drop_until_indicat: Tinye titrant ntụpọ na ntụpọ ruo mgbe ihe ngosi gbanwere agba. Isi nhata = nguzozi stoichiometric; isi nhata = ebe ihe ngosi na-agbanwe. Ha adịghị otu mgbe niile.
igbo.challenge_graded_titrations: Ihe ịma aka — Titration enyere akara
igbo.match_real_world_unknowns_by_titrating: Kwekọọ ihe amaghị nke ụwa n'ezie site na ime titration ruo ±0.05 ml nke uru echiche. Soro izi ezi + ọsọ; inye akara dabara na AP Chem.
igbo.safety_drills_what_could_go_wrong: Nkuzi nchekwa — Gịnị nwere ike ịga njehie
igbo.burette_explodes_acid_burns_spill_indi: Biuret gbawara, ọwụwa ọkụ acid, e tinyere ihe ngosi ngwa ngwa. Mụọ usoro nzaghachi ziri ezi tupu ọ dị mkpa n'ụlọ nyocha n'ezie.
igbo.burette_tolerance_0_05_ml_volumetric_f: Nnabata biuret 0.05 ml; flask oke 0.10 ml; pipette 0.02 ml. Klas izi ezi A megide B na-eme ka njehie okpukpu abụọ. Ntụzi dị mkpa karịa ka ụmụ akwụkwọ na-eche.
igbo.stock_diluent_desired_concentration_th: Stock + ihe mmebi → ọnụ ọgụgụ achọrọ. Nsogbu AP Chem 4 kacha nwalee na-agbadata na otu nhata a. Soro ọnụọgụ dị mkpa: nlele kacha adịghị ike na-ekpebi azịza.
igbo.buffer_discovery_when_does_a_buffer_ho: Nchọpụta buffer — Kedu mgbe buffer na-adịgide?
igbo.adjust_acid_strength_a_ha_ratio_starti: Dozie ike acid, ọnụọgụ [A⁻]/[HA], na pH mmalite. Nsonaazụ dị iche: buffer dị mma ma ọ bụ buffer adịghị mma (mgbe e tinyere acid ọzọ 20%). Enweghị akara, enweghị nkpughe — naanị nyocha na nleba anya.
igbo.redox_titration_not_a_ph_curve: ⚗ Titration redox — ọ bụghị ihü pH.
igbo.the_trace_shows_relative_reaction_prog: Ahịrị na-egosi ọganihu mmeghachi jikọtara, ọ bụghị pH — enweghị mita pH ebe a. Isi nhata bụ agba pink mbụ na-adịgide site na obere karịrị nke MnO₄⁻ (ọ na-emeghachi odo odo → enweghị agba ruo mgbe ahụ). Gụọ isi nhata a site n'agba.
igbo.where_moles_of_acid_moles_of_base_the_: — ebe moles nke acid = moles nke base. pH n'isi nhata a dabere na ike acid/base.
igbo.where_the_indicator_changes_color_idea: — ebe ihe ngosi na-agbanwe agba. A họọrọ ya nke ọma ka isi nhata ≈ isi nhata.
igbo.the_flat_part_of_a_weak_acid_base_curv: — akụkụ larịị nke ihü acid/base adịghị ike ebe pH na-eguzogide mgbanwe (Henderson–Hasselbalch na-arụ ọrụ).
igbo.weak_acids_bases_that_change_color_at_: — acid/base adịghị ike na-agbanwe agba na oke pH akọwapụtara. Họrọ nke oke mgbanwe ya gụnyere pH isi nhata.
igbo.lab_safety_best_practices: ⚠️ Omume nchekwa ụlọ nyocha kacha mma
igbo.acid_spill_neutralize_with_sodium_bica: — Ọwụwa acid: mee ka ọ dị nhaghị site na sodium bicarbonate, mgbe ahụ saa. Ọwụwa base: mee ka ọ dị nhaghị site na acid citric dị larịị. Mgbe niile dọọ ndị ọzọ aka na ntị n'ụlọ nyocha.
igbo.never_mix_bleach_with_ammonia_toxic_ch: — Egwakọtala bleach na ammonia ma ọlị (gas chloramine nsi). Etinyela mmiri na acid siri ike ma ọlị (ihe ize ndụ mmiri fesa na-esi ọkụ — mgbe niile tinye acid na mmiri).
igbo.rinse_the_burette_with_the_titrant_sol: — Saa biuret na ngwọta titrant tupu ịgba. Fee ya nwayọọ mgbe ọ bụla e tinyere. Gụọ biuret n'okpuru meniscus.
igbo.neutralized_acid_base_solutions_ph_6_8: — Ngwọta acid/base emere ka ọ dị nhaghị (pH 6–8) enwere ike ịwụsa n'ọwa mmiri na mmiri buru ibu. Maka ngwọta siri ike lelee amụma mkpofu kemịkal nke ụlọ ọrụ gị.
igbo.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: Iji okwu ndị dị mfe nke kwa ụbọchị na ahịrịokwu dị mkpirikpi
igbo.for_a_5th_grade_student_brief_and_frie: Maka nwa akwụkwọ klas 5, n'obere na enyi
igbo.for_a_high_school_chemistry_student_ac: Maka nwa akwụkwọ kemistrị sekọndrị, ziri ezi mana dị mfe ịghọta
igbo.click_explain_to_have_the_ai_tutor_des: Pịa «Kọwaa» ka onye nkụzi AI kọwaa titration a n'ọkwa ọgụgụ ị họọrọ.
igbo.lab_safety_chemistry_challenge: 🏆 Ihe ịma aka nchekwa ụlọ nyocha na kemistrị
igbo.lab_safety_incident_simulator: 🚨 Ihe nṅomi ihe mberede nchekwa ụlọ nyocha
igbo.practice_responding_to_real_lab_emerge: Mụọ nzaghachi na mberede ụlọ nyocha n'ezie. Họrọ nzaghachi ziri ezi maka ọnọdụ ọ bụla. Nkuzi ndị a nwere ike ịzọpụta ndụ gị n'ụlọ nyocha n'ezie!
igbo.lab_equipment_proper_technique: 🔬 Akụrụngwa ụlọ nyocha na usoro kwesịrị ekwesị
igbo.master_the_correct_technique_for_each_: Mụta usoro ziri ezi maka akụrụngwa ọ bụla. Ezigbo usoro = nsonaazụ ziri ezi + ọrụ ụlọ nyocha dị mma.
igbo.c_v_c_v_calculate_how_to_dilute_a_stoc: C₁V₁ = C₂V₂ — gbakọọ otu esi emebi ngwọta stock ruo ọnụ ọgụgụ ebumnuche.
igbo.always_add_acid_to_water_never_water_t: Mgbe niile tinye acid na mmiri, etinyela mmiri na acid ma ọlị. Ngwakọta na-esi ọkụ ma nwee ike ịkpata ọgbaghara siri ike na mmiri fesa acid siri ike.
igbo.add_the_stock_solution_to_the_water_ne: Tinye ngwọta stock na mmiri (etinyela mmiri na acid ma ọlị!)
igbo.stopper_and_invert_10_times_to_mix_tho: Mechie ma tụgharịa ugboro 10 ka ọ gwakọta nke ọma
igbo.strong_acid_strong_base_ph_meter_shows: Acid siri ike + base siri ike · Mita pH na-egosi mfe
igbo.three_sliders_weak_acid_strength_ka_bu: Slider atọ: ike acid adịghị ike (Ka), ọnụọgụ buffer [A⁻]/[HA], na pH mmalite. Nṅomi na-agwa gị ma buffer na-adịgide ma ọ bụ daa mgbe e tinyere acid ọzọ 20% (nsonaazụ dị iche — enweghị «akara buffer» ọnụọgụ). Kpụgharịa slider. Dee ihe ị hụrụ. Dee ihe ị chọpụtara gbasara ihe na-eme buffer ka ọ dị mma.
igbo.your_hypothesis_free_text_no_right_ans: Echiche gị (ederede efu — enweghị azịza ziri ezi):
igbo.what_single_condition_makes_the_differ: Kedu otu ọnọdụ na-eme ọdịiche n'etiti nke ọma na nke adịghị mma? Ọnụọgụ ọ dị mkpa karịa pKa? pH mmalite ọ dị mkpa ma ọlị? Dee echiche nke gị.
igbo.i_m_stuck_show_me_questions_to_think_a: 🤔 M rapaara — gosi m ajụjụ iji chee (enweghị azịza)
igbo.open_questions_investigate_by_manipula: Ajụjụ mepere emepe — nyochaa site na ịkpụgharị:
igbo.fix_ratio_at_1_0_sweep_pka_from_2_to_1: Dozie ọnụọgụ na 1.0. Kpochapụ pKa site na 2 ruo 12. Ụfọdụ uru pKa ọ bụ buffer dị mma karịa site n'okike? Gịnị mere ọ ga-eji dị otú a?
igbo.set_pka_4_74_acetic_acid_sweep_ratio_f: Dozie pKa = 4.74 (acid acetic). Kpochapụ ọnụọgụ site na 0.05 ruo 20. N'ọnụọgụ ole buffer na-adịgide? Enwere «igbe dị mma» nhata n'ọnụọgụ?
igbo.find_one_good_buffer_then_change_one_s: Chọta otu buffer dị mma. Mgbe ahụ gbanwee otu slider ruo mgbe ọ ga-adị njọ. Kedu otu mgbanwe kachasị irè?
igbo.log_4_5_good_buffers_with_different_pk: Dee buffer dị mma 4-5 nwere uru pKa dị iche. Kedu ihe pH mmalite ha nwere otu na pKa ha?
igbo.in_real_biochemistry_blood_is_buffered: Na biochemistry n'ezie, a na-eme buffer ọbara na pH 7.4 — kedu pKa ga-adaba karịa maka usoro buffer ahụ? Nyochaa site n'ịchọ buffer phosphate na bicarbonate.
igbo.no_answers_will_be_revealed_investigat: A gaghị ekpughe azịza ọ bụla. Nyochaa.
igbo.i_think_i_understand_the_trade_offs_le: Echere m na m ghọtara mgbanwe — hapụ m ka m kọwaa ha n'okwu nke m
igbo.explain_in_your_own_words_what_is_the_: Kọwaa n'okwu nke gị: kedu mmekọrịta dị n'etiti pKa, ọnụọgụ, na pH mmalite? Kedu otu ọnọdụ (ma ọ bụ ngwakọta) na-eme ka buffer dịgide megide acid karịa? Gịnị mere oke ọnụọgụ ji dị mkpa?
igbo.saved_notice_nobody_checked_your_answe: ✓ Echekwara ya. Ndetu — ọ dịghị onye lere azịza gị anya. Nke a bụ ọdịdị nyocha nke onye mmụta na-eduzi.
igbo.design_note_no_buffer_capacity_score_n: Ndetu nhazi: enweghị akara ikike buffer, enweghị bọtịnụ nkpughe, enweghị nyocha ule. A na-egosi nsonaazụ dị ka ọnọdụ 2 dị iche (dị mma / adịghị mma) kama ọkwa na-aga n'ihu — kpachaara anya, iji belata omume nkwalite. Isi ihe bụ nyocha, ọ bụghị ọnụọgụ.
